name: codex-supervisor
description: Codex Desktop wiring for the codex-supervisor agentic engineering factory.

interface.shortDescription: Operate supervisor queues and evidence from Codex Desktop.
interface.longDescription: Codex Supervisor exposes the repository's MCP stdio server so Codex Desktop can inspect and mutate planning SQLite queue state, current tasks, project facts, worker evidence, live Story Loop launches, and review ingestion through the Python core.
